content: Using the provided reference image, recreate the same mirror selfie composition as a very rough childlike doodle/sketch on a plain white background. Keep the subject’s pose, outfit, phone, jacket over one arm, ID badge, elevator mirrors, floor, and reflected figure in the same positions, but redraw everything with thin uneven hand-drawn lines, messy scribbles, and minimal detail, like a quick MS Paint or notebook sketch. Preserve the 3 blue elevator floor displays and simplify them into hand-drawn blue signs. Keep the face area obscured as a soft blurred block. Use sparse color accents only where they stand out in the reference: blue elevator numbers, brown hair/phone, black jacket and pants, white shirt and shoes, and the small red details on the jacket tag and badge.
title: Turn Elevator Selfie Into Doodle
description: This prompt converts a reference mirror selfie into a naive hand-drawn sketch while preserving the original composition and key recognizable details.

content: A cinematic vertical sci-fi personal brand poster in a dark blue cyberpunk style, designed like a futuristic profile infographic for {argument name="profile name" default="Meta_wu"}. The composition centers on a young Asian man shown from the back and in partial side profile, standing confidently in a glossy black futuristic jacket with luminous blue accents and the text “META_WU” and “WEB3 × AI” printed on the back. His face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular blur block. Behind him is a dramatic outer-space scene with a large glowing Earth filling the upper background, dense stars, a futuristic megacity skyline at night, neon road light trails, and 1 small flying spaceship near the left-middle area. At the very top, place a huge metallic ice-textured title reading “{argument name="main title" default="Meta_wu"}” in bold beveled silver letters with blue rim light. Directly below it, add 2 centered lines of Chinese text: the first line is a role tagline reading “BTC矿工｜币安夏普比率No.1交易员｜程序员｜专注web3+AI交叉”, and the second line reads “投资观察-加密货币&美股&A股”. Surround the character with glowing holographic HUD panels in transparent dark glass with cyan neon borders. On the left side, create 4 stacked panels: panel 1 is an “关于我” card containing 4 lines of profile info, “科技｜Hongkong 🇭🇰”, “github.com/Ferwoo”, “出生于 1999年5月1日”, and “2016年10月 加入”; panel 2 is a social stats card with 3 large metrics, “1,950 正在关注”, “3,906 关注者”, and “1 置顶推文”; panel 3 is a “BTC MINER” card showing 1 large gold Bitcoin coin and a server-mining rack scene; panel 4 is a “交易哲学” card with 3 lines of text, “数据驱动 × 理性决策”, “长期主义 × 价值投资”, and a glowing upward candlestick chart. On the right side, create 6 stacked panels: panel 1 shows a globe icon and “被全球KOLs关注 1”; panel 2 shows a group icon and “被中文KOLs关注 93”; panel 3 shows a chart icon and “全球影响力排名 62,434 /200K”; panel 4 shows a trophy icon and “华语影响力 5,053 /10K”; panel 5 is a “TRADER” card with subtitle “币安夏普比率 No.1” and a golden rising line graph, plus the small text “SHARPE RATIO TOP 1”; panel 6 is a “DEVELOPER” card with code-like text lines “// Code is law”, “// Web3 is future”, “// AI x Crypto”, “function build() {”, “return change_the_world();”, “}” and a GitHub-style icon. In the lower center, add a bold Chinese slogan in large glowing white text: “{argument name="slogan text" default="探索未来的交叉点"}”. Beneath it, add a smaller subtitle line: “在web3与AI的浪潮中，构建价值与未来”. At the bottom, include 3 rectangular category cards aligned horizontally: card 1 labeled “加密货币” with a Bitcoin icon and tiny market chart; card 2 labeled “美股” with Tesla and Apple logos; card 3 labeled “A股” with a rising bar-and-line market graph. At the very bottom center, place 4 Chinese keywords separated by vertical bars, “科技｜投资｜自由｜影响力”, and below them the English words “TECHNOLOGY · INVESTMENT · FREEDOM · INFLUENCE”.
